text: You're in. You'll start receiving hardware availability alerts shortly. These are real-time signals from live sources—not summaries or scraped deals.
You just received your first alert. This system only sends signals when: - real stock is detected - pricing is within normal range - confidence is high. This is what people miss manually.
That last alert was a high-confidence opportunity. If you're actively tracking hardware, speed matters here. Free tier is delayed—premium gives instant detection.
